title: Frontend Pages — Login, Jobs and MyJobs
tech: Vite, React 18, TypeScript, React Router v6, Axios, CSS Modules
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict, no UI component library, plain CSS Modules only, no inline styles
description: Implement the three page components for the frontend scaffold. The scaffold foundation already exists: AuthContext, Axios instance, ProtectedRoute, RoleRoute, main.tsx, App.tsx and routing are all in place. This task only adds the page components and their CSS modules. Pages should be functional but minimal — no complex UI, just working forms and lists.
acceptanceCriteria: LoginPage renders email + password form, calls authContext.login(), shows generic error on failure, redirects to / on success
LoginPage has loading state on submit button while request is in flight
JobsPage renders a placeholder job list with heading 'Jobs' — no real data yet, just the shell with a 'Create Job' button placeholder
MyJobsPage renders a placeholder with heading 'My Jobs' — no real data yet, just the shell
Each page has its own CSS module file with basic layout styles
All pages are TypeScript strict — no any types
Pages import and use AuthContext correctly via useAuth hook
Logout button visible on JobsPage and MyJobsPage, calls authContext.logout()
securityConsiderations: Login error message must remain generic — do not show whether email or password was wrong. No token or user data written to localStorage or sessionStorage anywhere in these components.
